name: Claude Code
dek: Apply deterministic policy to Claude Code actions before they change protected code.
workflow: Mault links the authenticated developer to Claude Code intent, evaluates the affected scope, and records the policy decision before evidence is sealed.
controls: Attribute agent actions to a verified developer
Protect paths, commands, and repository boundaries
Record permitted and blocked actions in one evidence chain

name: Cursor
dek: Govern agent-assisted edits and commands inside the Cursor development workflow.
workflow: Mault adds a policy and evidence layer around Cursor workflows without replacing the editor or forcing source code into a hosted control plane.
controls: Connect actions to developer identity and intent

name: GitHub Copilot
dek: Extend governance from Copilot-assisted coding into pull requests and protected delivery paths.
workflow: Mault evaluates state-changing actions around Copilot workflows and preserves an attributable record that security and engineering teams can review.
controls: Apply deterministic rules before sensitive changes

name: Windsurf
dek: Control agentic Windsurf workflows with local policy and verifiable action evidence.
workflow: Mault sits alongside the Windsurf workflow to evaluate scope, protected resources, and permitted actions while leaving the coding experience intact.
controls: Measure violations, rework, and review debt

name: OpenAI Codex
dek: Put deterministic controls around Codex tasks, commands, and repository changes.
workflow: Mault captures Codex intent and scope, evaluates the requested action against policy, and seals the resulting decision for later verification.

name: Augment
dek: Add enforceable controls to Augment-powered development across complex codebases.
workflow: Mault translates engineering and security requirements into deterministic policy that can be evaluated during Augment-assisted work.
controls: Map policy to repositories and protected paths
Trace agent intent to the responsible developer

name: Cline
dek: Govern Cline file edits, terminal actions, and tool use from one local policy layer.
workflow: Mault evaluates Cline actions at the point of execution, allowing safe work to continue while blocking activity outside approved boundaries.
controls: Seal allow and deny decisions as evidence

name: Kiro
dek: Turn Kiro workflows into policy-controlled, attributable engineering activity.
workflow: Mault applies explicit controls to Kiro-assisted work and gives security teams evidence that standards were evaluated rather than merely suggested.

name: Gemini
dek: Govern Gemini coding workflows without changing the model or exposing source code.
workflow: Mault remains model-independent: it evaluates the action, identity, scope, and policy outcome around Gemini-assisted development.
controls: Compare governed outcomes across agent workflows
